    Description
    static <T> TypeObjectMap<T>
    TypeObjectMap.fromClass(Class<T> objectClass, String label, Map<String,Type.Column> columnOverrides)

    Constructors in com.gpudb with parameters of type Type.Column
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ConvertingFieldHandler(Field field, Type.Column column)
    Creates a TypeObjectMap.ConvertingFieldHandler for the specified field and GPUdb column.
     
    ConvertingMethodHandler(Method getMethod, Method setMethod, Type.Column column)
    Creates a TypeObjectMap.ConvertingMethodHandler for the specified get and set methods and GPUdb column.
     
    Type(Type.Column... columns)
    Creates a Type object with the specified column metadata and an empty type label.
     
    Type(String label, Type.Column... columns)
    Creates a Type object with the specified metadata.
